name: openfamiliar
description: Local-first desktop familiars for coding workspaces

scripts.dev:creator: pnpm --filter @openfamiliar/creator-studio dev
scripts.validate:packs: cargo run -p familiar-cli -- pack validate mascots/perrito-tech && cargo run -p familiar-cli -- pack validate mascots/blank-template
scripts.ci:js: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm validate:packs
